response.step_by_step_log: Identified the song "Villain" (ヴィラン) via on-screen Japanese title. Performed search with: "Villain Tenioha lyrics Japanese and English". Identified Ouro Kronii as the performer. Divided video into performance and dialogue scenes.
response.global_summary: A 3D music video performance of the song "Villain" by Ouro Kronii, followed by a dialogue segment with IRyS.

scenes.description: Ouro Kronii performs the song 'Villain' in a virtual environment.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
きっと手をつなぐだけでぞっとされる
ラットレース一抜けたら通報される
ミュータントじゃないただの僕さ
XとかYとか
べき論者様は善悪他多害
僕が君を「侵害」するって言いふらしてる
Oh …
Mr.Crazy Villain Villain
夜行性の花弁
違う服着て君の前では男子のフリを
拝啓 Dr.Durand-Durand
ここだよ
顔も知らない誰かにとって僕はもうヴィラン
蛇蝎ライフ
挙句の果ての糜爛

(Note: This is an abridged version of the main chorus.)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Surely just holding hands will make you shudder
Once you slip out of the race, you'll be reported
I'm not a mutant, just me
X and Y
The moralist is saying I'm "violating" you
Oh ...
Mr. Crazy Villain, Villain
Nocturnal petals
I wear different clothes, pretending to be a boy in front of you
Dear Dr. Durand-Durand, I'm here
To someone who doesn't even know my face, I'm already a villain
Snake-scorpion life
And at the very end, erosion
